name: Stack Maze Challenge
description: This game will AMAZE you! Collect the blocks in the maze and build a bridge to reach the end. The more blocks you collect, the more rewards you will get. Get ready to be amazed! To fill in puzzles, fill each square to unlock more addictive AMAZE maze paint puzzles. Watch out! AMAZE gets harder as you play, color, and paint the maze, and fill in crossy road puzzles! Each level is a canvas
instructions: Tap the left mouse button amp Swipe
